title: U-Boat Prisoner
writer: Archie Gibbs, Aubrey Wisberg, Malcolm Stuart Boylan
actors: Bruce Bennett, Erik Rolf, John Abbott
plot: An American sailor poses as a Nazi spy in this implausible WWII action drama that reportedly is based on the actual experience of Archie Gibbs, a seaman detained aboard a German submarine. Gibbs assumes the identity of a Nazi whos...
